hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: The council’s signals are weak and volatility is elevated (0.39‑0.54). BTC and LTC show negative composites and alphas, while ETH and SOL have marginally positive composites but negative alphas and beta >1, making their long bias fragile. To preserve capital we adopt a cautious, risk‑off stance and trim convictions across the board, especially on the most fragile legs (ETH, SOL, LTC).
